description: Route intelligence contract for path generation, optimization, and explainable navigation decisions under spatial and operational constraints.

route.description: Generate a feasible route plan from an origin, destination, and operating constraints.

optimize.description: Improve an existing route plan for efficiency, cost, or service-level objectives.

explain.description: Explain route selection, tradeoffs, and constraint impacts for auditing and operator review.

examples: Generate a delivery route under active regional constraints
Optimize a planned route for cost and travel time
Explain why a route changed after updated temporal forecasts
